At the start of the phase, until the end of the battle round:
  -> Roll 8D6 (max 2 activations):
    - Unbridled Bloodlust: need pair of 1+ -> all friendly units get +1 to Charge rolls

    - Martial Excellence: need pair of 4+ -> all friendly units' melee weapons gain [SUSTAINED HITS 1]
    - Warp Blades: need pair of 5+ -> all friendly units' melee weapons gain [LETHAL HITS]
    - Decapitating Strikes: need triple of 6+ -> against Infantry targets, with melee attacks, all friendly units' weapons gain [DEVASTATING WOUNDS]
